summary_en: Expanded buyback authorization: 900,000 shares (5.04% of S/O, up from 400,000 / 2.21%), ¥200M total budget (up from ¥100M), execution window extended to Nov 30, 2026 (was Jun 30). As of May 14, 2026, 253,800 shares acquired for ¥64.6M under original authorization. Open-market method via Tokyo Stock Exchange.
title_en: Notice of Partial Revision of Matters Concerning Acquisition of Treasury Stock (Expansion of Acquisition Limit and Extension of Acquisition Period)
translation_en_brief:
On May 15, 2026, miratap inc. announced an expansion and extension of its treasury stock acquisition program. The board resolved on February 13, 2026 to acquire up to 400,000 shares (2.21% of outstanding shares) for a maximum of ¥100M through open-market purchases via the Tokyo Stock Exchange, with an execution window of February 16 to June 30, 2026. On May 15, the board expanded the program to authorize up to 900,000 shares (5.04% of outstanding shares) for a maximum of ¥200M, and extended the acquisition period to November 30, 2026.

As of May 14, the company had already acquired 253,800 shares for ¥64.6M under the original authorization, leaving capacity for additional purchases. The expansion and extension were determined after reviewing the company's share price and financial condition to enable more flexible treasury stock acquisition.
